body:
This PR adds support for ITime in ARS343 and SSPKnoth. This PR should be merged in after [PR#347](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaTimeSteppers.jl/pull/347). 

See this [issue](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaUtilities.jl/issues/145) in ClimaUtilities for the remaining PRs to merge for ITime.
title: Add support for ITime in IMEXAlgorithms and SSPKnoth
